selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel obstruction-language reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the obstruction admissibility parent into controller-facing fences for explicit obstruction typing, witness-bound nontrivialization failure, nonsemantic witness handling, anti-identity and anti-global-law boundaries, and future-layer nongeometric openings.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel math-class follow-on after the obstruction boundary is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the obstruction-language boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: OBSTRUCTION_IS_ONLY_AN_EXPLICIT_TRANSPORT_RELATED_RELATION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's typed obstruction admission rule without importing geometric doctrine.

candidate_items.name: OBSTRUCTION_REQUIRES_FINITE_WITNESSED_NONTRIVIALIZATION_FAILURE

candidate_items.name: WITNESS_TOKENS_STAY_SYNTACTIC_AND_NONGEOMETRIC
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's anti-evidence and anti-geometric witness rule into a direct controller fence.

candidate_items.name: OBSTRUCTION_CANNOT_IMPORT_IDENTITY_SUBSTITUTION_OR_GLOBAL_LAW
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's anti-default-law and anti-globalization posture into a controller-facing fence.

candidate_items.name: FUTURE_CURVATURE_LIKE_OPENINGS_REMAIN_FUTURE_AND_NONGEOMETRIC
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps future maneuvering room visible without granting present curvature, holonomy, or local-trivialization authority.

quarantined_items.name: OBSTRUCTION_LANGUAGE_AS_CURVATURE_OR_BUNDLE_DOCTRINE

quarantined_items.name: WITNESS_AND_LOCAL_OBSTRUCTION_AS_PROOF_OR_GLOBAL_LAW
